title: Almond Pancakes
description: A simple and delicious breakfast recipe with almond flour and milk for a nutty twist.

ingredients.name: nutty
ingredients.notes: Vanilla extract or nutmeg can also be used

ingredients.name: chocolate
ingredients.notes: Cocoa powder or chocolate chips can be used

ingredients.name: eggs
ingredients.notes: Replace with egg replacers if needed

ingredients.name: butter
ingredients.notes: Melting the butter before adding will help the pancakes bind

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, milk, nutty, and chocolate until smooth.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, butter, baking powder, and salt.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until combined.
Heat a skillet over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the skillet.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
